hero_desc: Stay current with the latest happenings, program launches, facility improvements, and community highlights at Los Cab.

featured.title: What's New at Los Cab — Winter 2026 Facility Upgrades
featured.text: We're excited to share several major upgrades to your Los Cab experience this winter. From brand-new steam and sauna rooms to a dedicated Pilates studio, we've invested in making your club even better.
bullets: ✦ New Steam & Sauna rooms in both locker rooms
✦ The "Cool" Pool — new specialty pool added
✦ New dedicated Pilates Room with reformers
✦ Sol Vida OC Café — now open (soft launch)

articles.title: New Stadium Lighting Installed on All 59 Pickleball Courts
articles.summary: All 59 pickleball courts at Los Cab now feature brand-new stadium lighting systems, dramatically improving evening play visibility and extending your court time well into the night.

articles.title: Sol Vida OC Café Is Now Open at Los Cab
articles.summary: We're thrilled to announce the soft opening of our on-site café, Sol Vida OC. Stop by before or after your workout for coffee, smoothies, fresh salads, and more.

articles.title: Personal Training Program Relaunches with New Trainers
articles.summary: Our fully relaunched personal training program pairs you with certified coaches for personalized fitness plans. One-on-one sessions now available to all members.

articles.title: Gem Day Spa Expands Service Menu for 2026
articles.summary: Our boutique on-site spa, Gem Day Spa, is expanding its menu of non-invasive facial and body treatments. New services are now available — book your appointment today.

articles.title: Junior Tennis Academy Sees Record Enrollment for Fall Season
articles.summary: Our Junior Tennis Academy welcomed its largest cohort ever this fall. With structured programs for all age groups, young players are developing exceptional skills and a love of the game.

articles.title: 6-8 Water Polo Academy Now Enrolling
articles.summary: The Los Cab 6-8 Water Polo Academy is now accepting registrations. Designed for young athletes ages 6–8, this program builds aquatic confidence and team sport fundamentals.

cta_text: Members get first access to event announcements, new programs, and club updates.
